message.content:
All tests pass. The Event.hs file has been successfully completed with all the necessary functions for the TUI application. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Summary of Implemented Functions

The completed `src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs` file includes:

### Core Event Handling
1. **`tui_appHandleEvent`** - Main event handler for the TUI application
2. **`handleTurnNavigationEvent`** - Handle navigation mode events with turn-by-turn navigation
3. **`handleNormalEvent`** - Handle all normal (non-navigation) events

### File Browser and Attachment Handling
4. **`handleFilePathDialogEvent`** / **`handleConfirmFileAttachment`** - File path input dialog
5. **`handleFileBrowserDialogEvent`** / **`handleFileBrowserSelection`** - File browser dialog using custom FileBrowser
6. **`loadFileAsAttachment`** / **`detectMimeType`** - File loading and MIME type detection
7. **`loadMediaAttachment`** - Load media attachments from paths
8. **`handleRemoveSelectedAttachment`** / **`handleClearAllAttachments`** - Attachment management
9. **`handleClipboardPaste`** / **`handleClipboardContent`** - Clipboard integration

### Widget-Specific Event Handlers
10. **`handleAgentListEvent`** - Agent list navigation
11. **`handleConversationListEvent`** - Conversation list navigation
12. **`handleSessionsListEvent`** - Sessions list navigation
13. **`handleMessageEditorEvent`** - Message editor input
14. **`handleConversationViewEvent`** / **`handleSessionViewEvent`** - Viewport scrolling
15. **`handleAgentInfoEvent`** - Agent info display
16. **`handleQueuedMessageListEvent`** - Queued message list navigation
17. **`handleAttachmentListEvent`** - Attachment list navigation

### Focus and Navigation
18. **`widgetToTab`** - Map widgets to their associated tabs
19. **`updateTabFromFocus`** - Update current tab based on focus
20. **`cycleFocusForward`** / **`cycleFocusBackward`** - Cycle through focus ring
21. **`toggleZoom`** - Toggle zoom mode
22. **`cycleTabForward`** / **`cycleTabBackward`** - Cycle through tabs

### Session and Conversation Access
23. **`getFocusedSession`** / **`getFocusedConversation`** / **`getFocusedConversationId`** - Get focused items
24. **`formatSessionMarkdown`** - Format session as markdown
25. **`handleDumpSessionToMarkdown`** - Export session to markdown file
26. **`handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer`** - View session with external viewer

### Conversation Management
27. **`handleNewConversation`** / **`handleNewConversationFromEditor`** - Create new conversations
28. **`handleRestoredConversation`** - Restore existing sessions
29. **`handleConversationNeedsInput`** - Handle agent waiting for input
30. **`updateConversationStatus`** - Update conversation status
31. **`handleConversationUpdated`** - Handle session progress updates
32. **`handleTogglePauseConversation`** / **`isConversationPaused`** - Pause/unpause conversations

### Subcall Handling (OS Model)
33. **`handleSubcallStarted`** - Handle subcall creation events
34. **`handleSubcallProgress`** - Update subcall progress
35. **`handleSubcallCompleted`** / **`handleSubcallFailed`** - Handle subcall completion
36. **`findAgentBySlug`** - Find agent by slug
37. **`createSubcallConversationEntry`** - Create subcall conversation entries

### Queued Message Management
38. **`handleClearQueuedMessages`** - Clear all queued messages
39. **`handleDeleteSelectedMessage`** / **`deleteAt`** - Delete selected messages
40. **`handleQueueNavigation`** - Navigate queued messages

### Helper Functions
41. **`buildOnProgress`** / **`buildOnProgressForConversation`** - Build progress callbacks
42. **`readAndClearBufferedMessages`** / **`readAndClearBufferedMessagesSTM`** - Buffered message handling
43. **`addBufferedMessage`** - Add buffered messages
44. **`runConversation`** - Run conversation (agent loop entry point)
45. **`handleSendMessage`** - Send messages from editor

### Key Changes from Original
- Uses **System.Agents.TUI.FileBrowser** (custom implementation) instead of Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser
- Custom FileBrowser has different types but similar functionality
- Proper integration with the OS model for subcall visibility
message.reasoning_content: All tests pass. The file has been successfully completed with all the necessary functions. Let me provide a summary of what was implemented.

contents.userPrompt:
You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.
When writing Bash code:
- Avoid bash-specific logic but bash-ism are fine.
- Document required shell tools at the top of the bash script.
When writing Haskell code:
- Use modern Haskell practices (base >= 4.14)
- Prefer pure functions and explicit type signatures
- Use standard libraries when appropriate
- Add clear comments for complex logic
- Follow consistent formatting
Use list-files to explore the project structure, read-file to understand existing code, write-file to create or modify files, and check-code to verify your work.
Always compile code before considering the job done.
Your output format may be stored as commit message: hence the first line of your last message should be a summary line.
You have access to a tool which is a copy of yourself named io_prompt_agent_oneshot, use it when a task is well-scoped in a way that it would save tokens in your context window and not interfere with your work.

contents.userPrompt:
You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.
When writing Bash code:
- Avoid bash-specific logic but bash-ism are fine.
- Document required shell tools at the top of the bash script.
When writing Haskell code:
- Use modern Haskell practices (base >= 4.14)
- Prefer pure functions and explicit type signatures
- Use standard libraries when appropriate
- Add clear comments for complex logic
- Follow consistent formatting
Use list-files to explore the project structure, read-file to understand existing code, write-file to create or modify files, and check-code to verify your work.
Always compile code before considering the job done.
Your output format may be stored as commit message: hence the first line of your last message should be a summary line.
You have access to a tool which is a copy of yourself named io_prompt_agent_oneshot, use it when a task is well-scoped in a way that it would save tokens in your context window and not interfere with your work.

userToolResponses.content:
The file now compiles cleanly. Here's a summary of the fixes I made to `src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs`:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. **Module Declaration and Imports**
- Added proper imports for all required modules (`Brick`, `Brick.Focus`, `Brick.Widgets.*`, `Control.Concurrent.Async`, `Control.Concurrent.STM`, `Control.Lens`, etc.)
- Fixed import collisions by hiding `zoom` from `Control.Lens` (using `Brick`'s `zoom` instead)
- Removed duplicate imports
- Added missing `liftIO` import from `Control.Monad.IO.Class`

### 2. **Fixed Syntax Errors**
- Fixed indentation error on line 519 (the `AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted ...)` pattern was not properly indented)
- Fixed all import list indentation issues

### 3. **Missing Definitions**
- Added missing `tabEntryWidget` case for `HelpTab`
- Added missing `buildFocusRingForTabPreserving` function
- Added missing `handleAttachmentListEvent` function definition
- Restructured `handleNormalEvent` to properly extract `VtyEvent` from `BrickEvent` for keybinding matching
- Added helper function `handleNonGlobalEvent` for better code organization

### 4. **Variable Name Shadowing**
- Renamed `current` to `currentTabValue` in `cycleTabForward` and `cycleTabBackward` to avoid shadowing the `currentTab` lens
- Renamed `name` to `convName` in `handleRestoredConversation` to avoid shadowing

### 5. **Fixed Undefined Variable**
- Fixed `viewer` variable in `handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer` - it now properly uses `mViewer` from the `lookupEnv` call with a `case` expression

### 6. **Type and Pattern Fixes**
- Fixed pattern matching in `handleAttachmentListEvent` to use `Vty.EvKey` patterns instead of `VtyEvent` constructor (since it receives `Vty.Event`, not `BrickEvent`)
- Fixed `matchesEvent` calls to use the extracted `Vty.Event` rather than the full `BrickEvent`

### 7. **Export Name**
- Renamed `tuiAppHandleEvent` to `tui_appHandleEvent` to match the expected API from Core.hs

content.content:
495	This is the main event handler when not in turn navigation mode or
496	attachment dialog mode.
497	-}
498	handleNormalEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
499	handleNormalEvent tracer ev = do
500	    keyMap <- use keyMapping
501	    
502	    -- Check for quit confirmation reset on any non-quit key press
503	    case ev of
504	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'q') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> pure ()
505	        VtyEvent _ -> resetQuitConfirmation
506	        _ -> pure ()
507	    
508	    case ev of
509	        -- Application events
510	        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat -> handleHeartbeat
511	        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) -> handleShowStatus severity text
512	        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus -> handleClearStatus
513	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId session) -> handleConversationUpdated convId session
514	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) -> handleConversationNeedsInput convId
515	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallStarted parentId subcallId agentSlug depth) -> 
516	            handleSubcallStarted tracer parentId subcallId agentSlug depth
517	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallProgress subcallId session) -> 
518	            handleSubcallProgress subcallId session
519	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted subcallId result) -> 
520	AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallFailed subcallId err) -> 
521	            handleSubcallFailed subcallId err
522	        
523	        -- Vty events
524	        VtyEvent vtyEv -> handleVtyEvent tracer keyMap vtyEv
525

518	            handleSubcallProgress subcallId session
519	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted subcallId result) -> 
520	            handleSubcallCompleted subcallId result

528	handleVtyEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> KeyMapping -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
529	handleVtyEvent tracer keyMap ev = do
530	    currentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
531	    activeTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
532	    
533	    -- First check for global keybindings
534	    case () of
535	        _ | matchesEvent keyMap EventQuit ev -> handleQuit
536	          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabForward ev -> cycleTabForward
537	          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabBackward ev -> cycleTabBackward
538	          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusForward ev -> cycleFocusForward
539	          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusBackward ev -> cycleFocusBackward
540	          | matchesEvent keyMap EventToggleZoom ev -> toggleZoom

contents.userPrompt:
You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.
When writing Bash code:
- Avoid bash-specific logic but bash-ism are fine.
- Document required shell tools at the top of the bash script.
When writing Haskell code:
- Use modern Haskell practices (base >= 4.14)
- Prefer pure functions and explicit type signatures
- Use standard libraries when appropriate
- Add clear comments for complex logic
- Follow consistent formatting
Use list-files to explore the project structure, read-file to understand existing code, write-file to create or modify files, and check-code to verify your work.
Always compile code before considering the job done.
Your output format may be stored as commit message: hence the first line of your last message should be a summary line.
You have access to a tool which is a copy of yourself named io_prompt_agent_oneshot, use it when a task is well-scoped in a way that it would save tokens in your context window and not interfere with your work.

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "        _ -> pure ()

-- | Handle Vty events.
handleVtyEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> KeyMapping -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleVtyEvent tracer keyMap ev = do
    currentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    activeTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    
    -- First check for global keybindings
    case () of
        _ | matchesEvent keyMap EventQuit ev -> handleQuit
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabForward ev -> cycleTabForward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabBackward ev -> cycleTabBackward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusForward ev -> cycleFocusForward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusBackward ev -> cycleFocusBackward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventToggleZoom ev -> toggleZoom
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventNewConversation ev -> handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventSendMessage ev -> handleSendMessage tracer
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventAttachFile ev -> openFilePathDialog
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventClearAttachments ev -> handleClearAllAttachments
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventPasteClipboard ev -> handleClipboardPaste
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventExportSession ev -> handleDumpSessionToMarkdown
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventViewSessionChronological ev -> 
                handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Chronological
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventViewSessionReverse ev -> 
                handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Antichronological
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventClearQueuedMessages ev -> handleClearQueuedMessages
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventTogglePause ev -> handleTogglePauseConversation
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventRefreshTools ev -> handleRefreshTools
          | otherwise -> handleWidgetSpecificEvent tracer currentFocus ev

-- | Handle widget-specific events.
handleWidgetSpecificEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Maybe WidgetName -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleWidgetSpecificEvent tracer currentFocus ev = do
    case currentFocus of
        Just AgentListWidget -> handleAgentListEvent tracer ev", "ranges": "525-565"}

switchToChatsAndFocusMessage :: EventM N TuiState ()

content.content:
155	
156	-- | Cycle to the next tab forward.
157	cycleTabForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
158	cycleTabForward = do
159	    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
160	    let next = nextTab current
161	    tuiUI . currentTab .= next
162	    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
163	    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving next mCurrentFocus
164	
165	-- | Cycle to the previous tab backward.
166	cycleTabBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
167	cycleTabBackward = do
168	    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
169	    let prev = prevTab current
170	    tuiUI . currentTab .= prev
171	    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
172	    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving prev mCurrentFocus
173	
174	-- | Switch to the Chats tab and focus the message editor.
175	switchToChatsAndFocusMessage :: EventM N TuiState ()
176	switchToChatsAndFocusMessage = do
177	    tuiUI . currentTab .= ChatsTab
178	    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= focusSetCurrent MessageEditorWidget (buildFocusRingForTab ChatsTab)
179	    tuiUI . zoomed .= False
180

                    asyncTask <- liftIO $ async $ do
                        (exitCode, _, err) <- readProcessWithExitCode viewer [tempFile] ""
                        case exitCode of
                            ExitSuccess -> pure ()
                            ExitFailure code -> 
                                hPutStrLn stderr $ "Viewer exited with code " ++ show code ++ ": " ++ err
                    
                    -- Store the task for cleanup
                    let auxTask = Viewer
                            { viewerAsync = asyncTask
                            , viewerConversationId = conversationId conv
                            , viewerSessionId = session.sessionId
                            }
                    tuiUI . auxiliaryTasks %= (auxTask :)
                    
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Opening session in external viewer"

{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "                    -- Launch viewer asynchronously
                    asyncTask <- liftIO $ async $ do
                        (exitCode, _, err) <- readProcessWithExitCode viewer [tempFile] ""
                        case exitCode of
                            ExitSuccess -> pure ()
                            ExitFailure code -> 
                                hPutStrLn stderr $ "Viewer exited with code " ++ show code ++ ": " ++ err
                    
                    -- Store the task for cleanup
                    let auxTask = Viewer
                            { viewerAsync = asyncTask
                            , viewerConversationId = conversationId conv
                            , viewerSessionId = session.sessionId
                            }
                    tuiUI . auxiliaryTasks %= (auxTask :)
                    
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Opening session in external viewer"", "ranges": "936-954"}

{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- ============================================================================
-- Session Export and Viewing
-- ============================================================================

-- | Format the current session as markdown.
formatSessionMarkdown :: Session -> OrderPreference -> Text.Text
formatSessionMarkdown session order =
    let opts = SessionPrintOptions
            { sessionPrintFile = ""
            , showToolCallResults = ShownFull
            , showToolCallArguments = ShownFull
            , nTurns = Nothing
            , repeatSystemPrompt = False
            , repeatTools = False
            , orderPreference = order
            , noFunnyStamp = True
            }
    in formatSessionAsMarkdown opts session

-- | Export the current session to a markdown file.
handleDumpSessionToMarkdown :: EventM N TuiState ()
handleDumpSessionToMarkdown = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    case mConv of
        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
        Just conv -> do
            case conversationSession conv of
                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No session to export"
                Just session -> do
                    let convIdStr = Text.unpack $ shortConvId (conversationId conv)
                    let filename = "session-" <> convIdStr <> ".md"
                    let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown session Chronological
                    liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile filename markdown
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Session exported to " <> Text.pack filename

-- | View the current session with an external markdown viewer.
handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer :: OrderPreference -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer order = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    case mConv of
        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
        Just conv -> do
            case conversationSession conv of
                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No session to view"
                Just session -> do
                    -- Create a temp file with the session markdown
                    tempFile <- liftIO $ writeSystemTempFile "session-view.md" ""
                    let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown session order
                    
                    -- Write to temp file
                    liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile tempFile markdown
                    
                    -- Try to open with external viewer
                    mViewer <- liftIO $ lookupEnv "AGENTS_MARKDOWN_VIEWER"
                    let viewer = fromMaybe "cat" mViewer
                    
                    -- Launch viewer asynchronously
                    asyncTask <- liftIO $ async $ do
                        (exitCode, _, err) <- readProcessWithExitCode viewer [tempFile] ""
                        case exitCode of
                            ExitSuccess -> pure ()
                            ExitFailure code -> 
                                hPutStrLn stderr $ "Viewer exited with code " ++ show code ++ ": " ++ err
                    
                    -- Store the task for cleanup
                    let auxTask = Viewer
                            { viewerAsync = asyncTask
                            , viewerConversationId = conversationId conv
                            , viewerSessionId = session.sessionId
                            }
                    tuiUI . auxiliaryTasks %= (auxTask :)
                    
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Opening session in external viewer"", "ranges": "882-951"}

902	            { sessionPrintFile = ""

904	            , showToolCallArguments = ShownFull

906	            , repeatSystemPrompt = False
907	            , repeatTools = False
908	            , orderPreference = order
909	            , noFunnyStamp = True
910	            }
911	    in formatSessionAsMarkdown opts session

You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.
When writing Bash code:
- Avoid bash-specific logic but bash-ism are fine.
- Document required shell tools at the top of the bash script.
When writing Haskell code:
- Use modern Haskell practices (base >= 4.14)
- Prefer pure functions and explicit type signatures
- Use standard libraries when appropriate
- Add clear comments for complex logic
- Follow consistent formatting
Use list-files to explore the project structure, read-file to understand existing code, write-file to create or modify files, and check-code to verify your work.

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Format the current session as markdown.
formatSessionMarkdown :: Session -> OrderPreference -> Text.Text
formatSessionMarkdown session order =
    let opts = SessionPrintOptions
            { sessionPrintFile = ""
            , showToolCallResults = ShownFull
            , showToolCallArguments = ShownFull
            , nTurns = Nothing
            , repeatSystemPrompt = False
            , repeatTools = False
            , orderPreference = order
            , noFunnyStamp = True
            }
    in formatSessionAsMarkdown opts session

-- | Export the current session to a markdown file.
handleDumpSessionToMarkdown :: EventM N TuiState ()
handleDumpSessionToMarkdown = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    case mConv of
        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
        Just conv -> do
            case conversationSession conv of
                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No session to export"
                Just session -> do
                    let convIdStr = Text.unpack $ shortConvId (conversationId conv)
                    let filename = "session-" <> convIdStr <> ".md"
                    let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown session Chronological
                    liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile filename markdown
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Session exported to " <> Text.pack filename

-- | View the current session with an external markdown viewer.
handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer :: OrderPreference -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer order = do
    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
    case mConv of
        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
        Just conv -> do
            case conversationSession conv of
                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No session to view"
                Just session -> do
                    -- Create a temp file with the session markdown
                    tempFile <- liftIO $ writeSystemTempFile "session-view.md" ""
                    let markdown = formatSessionMarkdown session order
                    
                    -- Write to temp file
                    liftIO $ TextIO.writeFile tempFile markdown
                    
                    -- Try to open with external viewer
                    mViewer <- liftIO $ lookupEnv "AGENTS_MARKDOWN_VIEWER"
                    let viewer = fromMaybe "cat" mViewer
                    
                    -- Launch viewer asynchronously
                    asyncTask <- liftIO $ async $ do
                        (exitCode, _, err) <- readProcessWithExitCode viewer [tempFile] ""
                        case exitCode of
                            ExitSuccess -> pure ()
                            ExitFailure code -> 
                                hPutStrLn stderr $ "Viewer exited with code " ++ show code ++ ": " ++ err
                    
                    -- Store the task for cleanup
                    let auxTask = Viewer
                            { viewerAsync = asyncTask
                            , viewerConversationId = conversationId conv
                            , viewerSessionId = session.sessionId
                            }
                    tuiUI . auxiliaryTasks %= (auxTask :)
                    
                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Opening session in external viewer"", "ranges": "899-958"}

988	syncWithCoreState = do
989	    core <- use tuiCore
990	    coreState <- liftIO $ readTVarIO core
991	    
992	    -- Sync buffered messages

994	    tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages .= bufferedMsgs

1000	handleShowStatus :: StatusSeverity -> Text.Text -> EventM N TuiState ()
1001	handleShowStatus severity text = do
1002	    now <- liftIO getCurrentTime
1003	    let msg = StatusMessage text severity now
1004	    tuiUI . statusMessage .= Just msg
1005	
1006	-- | Handle clearing the status message.
1007	handleClearStatus :: EventM N TuiState ()
1008	handleClearStatus = do
1009	    tuiUI . statusMessage .= Nothing
1010	
1011	-- ============================================================================
1012	-- Conversation Management
1013	-- ============================================================================
1014	
1015	-- | Handle creating a new conversation from the editor state.
1016	handleNewConversationFromEditor :: Tracer IO Trace -> EventM N TuiState ()
1017	handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer = do
1018	    mAgent <- use (tuiUI . selectedAgentInfo)
1019	    case mAgent of
1020	        Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No agent selected"

{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Handle Vty events.
handleVtyEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> KeyMapping -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleVtyEvent tracer keyMap ev = do
    currentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    activeTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    
    -- First check for global keybindings
    case () of
        _ | matchesEvent keyMap EventQuit ev -> handleQuit
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabForward ev -> cycleTabForward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleTabBackward ev -> cycleTabBackward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusForward ev -> cycleFocusForward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventCycleFocusBackward ev -> cycleFocusBackward
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventToggleZoom ev -> toggleZoom
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventNewConversation ev -> handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventSendMessage ev -> handleSendMessage tracer
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventAttachFile ev -> openFilePathDialog
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventClearAttachments ev -> handleClearAllAttachments
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventPasteClipboard ev -> handleClipboardPaste
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventExportSession ev -> handleDumpSessionToMarkdown
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventViewSessionChronological ev -> 
                handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Chronological
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventViewSessionReverse ev -> 
                handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Antichronological
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventClearQueuedMessages ev -> handleClearQueuedMessages
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventTogglePause ev -> handleTogglePauseConversation
          | matchesEvent keyMap EventRefreshTools ev -> handleRefreshTools
          | otherwise -> handleWidgetSpecificEvent tracer currentFocus ev

-- | Handle widget-specific events.
handleWidgetSpecificEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Maybe WidgetName -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
handleWidgetSpecificEvent tracer currentFocus ev = do
    case currentFocus of
        Just AgentListWidget -> handleAgentListEvent tracer ev
        Just ConversationListWidget -> handleConversationListEvent tracer ev
        Just SessionsListWidget -> handleSessionsListEvent tracer ev
        Just MessageEditorWidget -> handleMessageEditorEvent ev
        Just ConversationViewWidget -> handleConversationViewEvent ev
        Just SessionViewWidget -> handleSessionViewEvent ev
        Just AgentInfoWidget -> handleAgentInfoEvent ev
        Just QueuedMessageListWidget -> handleQueuedMessageListEvent ev
        Just AttachmentListWidget -> handleAttachmentListEvent ev
        _ -> handleGlobalVtyEvent ev", "ranges": "553-594"}

{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "cycleTabForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleTabForward = do
    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    let next = nextTab current
    tuiUI . currentTab .= next
    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving next mCurrentFocus

-- | Cycle to the previous tab backward.
cycleTabBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleTabBackward = do
    current <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    let prev = prevTab current
    tuiUI . currentTab .= prev
    mCurrentFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing .= buildFocusRingForTabPreserving prev mCurrentFocus", "ranges": "116-132"}

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Cycle focus forward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusForward = do
    oldTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusNext
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= oldTab) $ do
                tuiUI . currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Cycle focus backward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusBackward = do
    oldTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusPrev
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= oldTab) $ do
                tuiUI . currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Toggle zoom mode.
toggleZoom :: EventM N TuiState ()
toggleZoom = do
    isZoomed <- use (tuiUI . zoomed)
    tuiUI . zoomed .= not isZoomed
    showStatus StatusInfo $ if not isZoomed then "Zoom enabled" else "Zoom disabled"", "ranges": "857-886"}

Let me fix this by renaming the local variables.

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Cycle focus forward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusForward = do
    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusNext
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Cycle focus backward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusBackward = do
    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusPrev
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Toggle zoom mode.
toggleZoom :: EventM N TuiState ()
toggleZoom = do
    zoomed <- use (tuiUI . zoomed)
    tuiUI . zoomed .= not zoomed
    showStatus StatusInfo $ if not zoomed then "Zoom enabled" else "Zoom disabled"", "ranges": "857-886"}

function.arguments:
{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "-- | Cycle focus forward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusForward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusForward = do
    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . _currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusNext
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . _currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Cycle focus backward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusBackward = do
    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . _currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusPrev
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . _currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Toggle zoom mode.
toggleZoom :: EventM N TuiState ()
toggleZoom = do
    zoomed <- use (tuiUI . _zoomed)
    tuiUI . _zoomed .= not zoomed
    showStatus StatusInfo $ if not zoomed then "Zoom enabled" else "Zoom disabled"", "ranges": "857-886"}

{"capability": "write-file-range", "path": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . _currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusNext
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . _currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Cycle focus backward through the focus ring.
cycleFocusBackward :: EventM N TuiState ()
cycleFocusBackward = do
    currentTab <- use (tuiUI . _currentTab)
    tuiUI . uiFocusRing %= focusPrev
    mFocus <- use (tuiUI . uiFocusRing . to focusGetCurrent)
    case mFocus of
        Just widget -> 
            when (widgetToTab widget /= currentTab) $ do
                tuiUI . _currentTab .= widgetToTab widget
        Nothing -> pure ()

-- | Toggle zoom mode.
toggleZoom :: EventM N TuiState ()
toggleZoom = do
    zoomed <- use (tuiUI . _zoomed)
    tuiUI . _zoomed .= not zoomed
    showStatus StatusInfo $ if not zoomed then "Zoom enabled" else "Zoom disabled"", "ranges": "859-886"}

{"filepath": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Event.hs", "content": "{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}

{- | Event handling for the TUI application.

This module handles all user input and application events for the TUI.
During migration to the OS model, tool operations use the RuntimeBridge
which synchronizes tools between the legacy Runtime and OS Core.
-}
module System.Agents.TUI.Event where

import Brick
import Brick.BChan (BChan, newBChan, readBChan, writeBChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusGetCurrent, focusNext, focusPrev, focusRing, focusSetCurrent)
import Brick.Widgets.Edit (editContentsL, getEditContents, handleEditorEvent)
import Brick.Widgets.List (handleListEvent, listElements, listInsert, listSelectedElement, listSelectedL)
import qualified Brick.Widgets.List as List
import Control.Concurrent (forkIO, threadDelay)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (async, poll)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (STM, TVar, atomically, modifyTVar, readTVar, readTVarIO, writeTVar)
import Control.Lens (to, use, (%=), (.=), (^.), _Just, (&), (.~))
import Control.Monad (filterM, void, when)
import Control.Monad.IO.Class (liftIO)
import qualified Data.ByteString as ByteString
import qualified Data.ByteString.Base64 as Base64
import Data.Char (toLower)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import Data.Maybe (fromMaybe, listToMaybe)
import qualified Data.Text as Text
import qualified Data.Text.Encoding as TextEncoding
import qualified Data.Text.IO as TextIO
import qualified Data.Text.Zipper as TextZipper
import Data.Time (diffUTCTime, getCurrentTime)
import qualified Data.UUID as UUID
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector
import qualified Graphics.Vty as Vty
import System.Environment (lookupEnv)
import System.Exit (ExitCode (..))
import System.FilePath (takeExtension, takeFileName, (<.>))
import System.IO (hPutStrLn, stderr)
import System.IO.Temp (writeSystemTempFile)
import System.Process (readProcessWithExitCode)

import System.Agents.AgentTree (OSAgentNode (..), osNodeTools, OSAgentTree)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId (..), ConversationId (..), newConversationId, AgentSlug)
import System.Agents.CLI.PromptScript (parseMediaReference, resolveMediaType)
import System.Agents.Combinators.ProgressiveDisclosure (agentEvaluateActiveTools)
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment (..))
import qualified System.Agents.OneShot as OneShot (Trace, mapProgressiveDisclosureTrace, nodeToAgent)
import qualified System.Agents.Runtime.Trace as Runtime (Trace)
import System.Agents.Session.Base (
    Action (..),
    Agent (..),
    MissingUserPrompt (..),
    OnSessionProgress,
    Session (..),
    SessionProgress (..),
    UserQuery (..),
    newSessionId,
    newTurnId,
 )
import qualified System.Agents.Session.Loop as Loop (run)
import System.Agents.SessionPrint (OrderPreference (..), PrintVisibility (..), SessionPrintOptions (..), formatSessionAsMarkdown)
import qualified System.Agents.SessionStore as SessionStore
import System.Agents.TUI.Clipboard (
    ClipboardContent (..),
    ContentAction (..),
    detectClipboardContent,
    hasClipboardSupport,
    loadMediaAttachmentFromPath,
 )
import System.Agents.TUI.FileBrowser (

    FileBrowserEntry (..),

    fileBrowserSelection,

 )
import System.Agents.TUI.KeyMapping (
